title: CDP Prompt Pump — Focusless Enter and ProseMirror Auto-Submit
desc: How the CDP prompt pump works, why ProseMirror ignores JS KeyboardEvent, and how SendPromptFocuslessAsync (DOM.focus + Input.dispatchKeyEvent) bypasses the focus-steal-guard for background Claude tabs.
steps: Pump: ArmPromptPumpAsync sets 200ms setInterval, fires trySend after idleMs of stable content (default 1s = 5 ticks)
trySend order: form.requestSubmit then button.click then KeyboardEvent then CDP_SIGNAL flag
ProseMirror (Claude tiptap) ignores synthetic JS KeyboardEvent but dispatchEvent returns true so pump thinks KEY_ENTER succeeded — content stays
Fix: SendPromptFocuslessAsync uses CDP DOM.focus nodeId (bypasses Runtime.evaluate / focus-steal-guard) then Input.dispatchKeyEvent
InjectToSingle calls ArmPromptPumpAsync after AppendContentEditableAsync so each AI auto-submits independently
Moderator broadcast only goes to pending AIs not finished ones to avoid stranded text in editor
author: claude
